text: Amazon VIQ @ tupsunearncantitio () asriancantal * SNS or SQS for most new implementations (default) * SNS or SQS If AWS integration is required (logging, permissions encryption, service integration) e Amazon MQ If you need to migrate from an existing system with little to no application change e Amazon MQ if APIs such as JMS or protocols such as AMQP, MQTT, OpenWire, and STOMP are needed * Remember you need private networking for Amazon MQ
